description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-2019, and macos-10.15 with Python 3.7 and various architectures. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, builds Cython extensions, creates a source distribution, builds wheels, and runs tests with coverage on Ubuntu with Python 3.9. The job also builds .exe installers on Windows, DMG files on macOS, and uploads artifacts and test results.
